title: Star Wars Missions 10: Showdown in Mos Eisley
content:
{{Top|rwm|reb|italics=1}} {{Book |image=[[File:Missions10.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars Missions 10:
Showdown in Mos Eisley'' |author=[[Ryder Windham]] |cover artist= |illustrator= |editor= |publisher=[[Scholastic]] |early release= |release date=[[June]] [[1998]]''[[Star Wars Missions 10: Showdown in Mos Eisley]]'' |intl release= |rereleased= |media type=Paperback |pages=70 |isbn=0590565001 |isbn2= |isbn3= |timeline=[[0 ABY/Legends|0–0.5 ABY]]''[[Star Wars Missions 9: Revolt of the Battle Droids]]'' and the next three ''Star Wars Missions'' books tell a continuous story, which depicts the Rebel Alliance still occupying their base on Yavin 4, thus placing it in the first six months of [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] before the [[Evacuation of Yavin]] per ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''. |series=''[[Star Wars Missions]]'' |preceded by=''[[Star Wars Missions 9: Revolt of the Battle Droids]]'' |followed by=''[[Star Wars Missions 11: Bounty Hunters vs. Battle Droids]]'' }} '''''Star Wars Missions 10: Showdown in Mos Eisley''''' is the tenth adventure book in the ''[[Star Wars Missions]]'' young-reader series and [[roleplaying game]]. It was published by [[Scholastic]] in [[June]] [[1998]]. {{Book-stub}} ==Publisher's summary== ''You are a swoop biker working for Jabba the Hutt. Your base is a cantina in Mos Eisley, one of the most dangerous spaceport cities in the galaxy. And now things have become even more dangerous. Battle droids have attacked your cantina, injuring your friends…and threatening Jabba himself. Your Mission: to save Jabba from the deadly droids…or else.'' ''Good luck.'' ==Plot summary== The [[Victory I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Decimator (Star Destroyer)|''Decimator'']] approaches [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], carrying [[12-4C-41's Droid Army]]. [[12-4C-41]]'s assistants question his plans, but persist towards the desert planet. Meanwhile, planetside, the bikers [[Gizman|Big Gizz]], [[Spiker]], and [[Twitch (biker)|Twitch]] wait in [[Ben Kenobi's home/Legends|Ben Kenobi's hut]]. There, a group of [[Jawa/Legends|Jawas]] investigate the threesome's [[Swoop/Legends|swoops]], but are warded off. Big Gizz decides to go to [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] for a drink, before returning to [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|Jabba's Palace]]. At [[Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina/Legends|Chalmun's Cantina]], however, 12-4C-41 ("Wuntoo") and his Droid Army attack, seeking the location of Jabba's palace. The bikers, however, prepare to fight back. They defend the cantina, but one of the bikers realizes that Wuntoo has stolen a swoop, headed for Jabba's Palace. Tracking the droid to Docking Bay 94, the biker is unable to stop it heading for the Palace, but instead continues tracking Wuntoo on his swoop. The chase eventually ends at [[Beggar's Canyon/Legends|Beggar's Canyon]], where Wuntoo is defeated. However, his army, aboard the [[Drone barge/Legends|drone barge]], rescues him and captures the biker. The biker escapes, however, and contacts Jabba's Palace, warning them of the impending attack, before they are confronted by Wuntoo. Jabba's security forces attack and drive off the barge, while the biker safely escapes. Big Gizz, Spiker, and Twitch tell Jabba that the droids intended to assassinate the crime lord, blurring the truth somewhat. Jabba, enraged, orders [[Bib Fortuna/Legends|Bib Fortuna]] to recall all bounty hunters and send them after Wuntoo's army. ==Appearances== {{App |characters= *[[12-4C-41]] *[[Gizman|Big Gizz]] *[[Boonda/Legends|Boonda]] *[[BP-A1]] *[[BP-A2]] *[[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] {{Imo}} *[[Lirin Car'n/Legends|Lirin Car'n]] *[[Nalan Cheel/Legends|Nalan Cheel]] *[[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] {{Mo}} *[[Salacious B.
